title: Payment Gateway Timeout

description: The analytics dashboard crashes when trying to export reports larger than 50MB.

description: The toggle switch disappeared after the last CSS deployment.

description: OAuth2 tokens are expiring prematurely, causing session drops.

description: Initial load time for the main dashboard is exceeding 8 seconds.

description: The 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer leads to a 404 page.

description: Implement the multi-step welcome wizard for first-time signups.

description: CPU usage on node-04 has been sustained at 95% for over an hour.

title: Typo in Marketing Email

title: Bulk Upload Feature Request
description: Customer wants to upload multiple inventory items via Excel instead of one by one.
